ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* User's chosen username */,
  "email" TEXT /* User's email address */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the user registered on the platform */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "user_type" TEXT /* Type of user (e.g., regular, premium) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number */,
  "address" TEXT /* User's address */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venues" (
  "venue_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each venue */,
  "venue_name" TEXT /* Name of the venue */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the venue (e.g., Pub, Restaurant) */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographical latitude of the venue */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographical longitude of the venue */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the venue is located */,
  "postcode" TEXT /* Postcode of the venue */,
  "venue_type" TEXT /* Type of venue (e.g., indoor, outdoor) */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the venue */,
  "open_hours" TEXT /* Open hours of the venue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venue_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "venue_id" TEXT /* ID of the venue associated with the image */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  "image_type" TEXT /* Type of image (e.g., logo, interior) */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the image was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_venue_images_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "check_ins" (
  "check_in_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each check-in event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who checked in */,
  "venue_id" TEXT /* ID of the venue where the user checked in */,
  "utc_time" TEXT /* Time of the check-in in UTC */,
  "timezone_offset" INTEGER /* Timezone offset from UTC */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Unique timestamp for the check-in event */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the check-in */,
  "check_in_type" TEXT /* Type of check-in (e.g., manual, automatic) */,
  "device_used" TEXT /* Device used for the check-in (e.g., mobile, tablet) */,
  "check_in_method" TEXT /* Method used for the check-in (e.g., GPS, QR code) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("check_in_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_check_ins_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_check_ins_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venue_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "venue_id" TEXT /* ID of the venue being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment written by the user */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was written */,
  "review_type" TEXT /* Type of review (e.g., food, service) */,
  "review_tags" TEXT /* Tags associated with the review (e.g., friendly staff, good food) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_venue_reviews_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_venue_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venue_promotions" (
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotion */,
  "venue_id" TEXT /* ID of the venue offering the promotion */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the promotion */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the promotion */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the promotion */,
  "promotion_type" TEXT /* Type of promotion (e.g., discount, free item) */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Amount of discount offered */,
  "promotion_tags" TEXT /* Tags associated with the promotion (e.g., food, drinks) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promotion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_venue_promotions_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of venues the user prefers */,
  "preference_level" INTEGER /* Level of preference (1-10) */,
  "preference_type" TEXT /* Type of preference (e.g., favorite, avoid) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "advertisements" (
  "ad_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each advertisement */,
  "venue_id" TEXT /* ID of the venue associated with the advertisement */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user targeted by the advertisement */,
  "ad_content" TEXT /* Content of the advertisement */,
  "display_date" TEXT /* Date when the advertisement was displayed */,
  "ad_type" TEXT /* Type of advertisement (e.g., banner, popup) */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Target audience for the advertisement (e.g., age group, interests) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ad_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_advertisements_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_advertisements_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id")
)
